title: Create: Too Much Engineering
description: A modpack and server containing many Create mod addons.
body:
# Create: Too Much Engineering
Create: Too Much Engineering (TME for short) is a modpack and server containing many Create mod addons including:
- Steam 'n' Rails
- Central Kitchen
- Enchantment Industry
- Aquatic Ambitions
- Railways Navigator
- Crafts & Additions
- Connected
- ...and many more

The main focus is building complex automation and exploring limitless possibilities with other players.

This is not a questing modpack and was originally made for my Create mod server.
It's currently in a Beta state and you may experience bugs.

### Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/gfcRrBTNVu) to join the server.
